core_definition: L1 and S1 catalogs exist to state what geometry a record is. The essential disclosure is geometry_class + family + subtype.

coverage_unit.variant_policy: Variants are optional refinements below subtype and are not required for first-pass completeness.

tier_policy.note: Tier segmentation is retired. Catalog completeness is defined by explicit geometry identification, not by tier rank.

layer_roles.S1: Machine-readable geometry-first source catalog aligned to the same class/family/subtype structure for downstream P-layer use.
